summary_en: Correction to tender offer disclosure for Ryomo Systems: per-share dividend raised from 22 yen to 44 yen; no-dividend periods extended to include both Q2 FY2026 and FY2027 year-end.
title_en: Correction Notice: Notice of Commencement of Tender Offer for Ryomo Systems Inc. (Securities Code: 9691)
translation_en_brief: Mitsuba Corporation and Chubu Electric Power Company issued a correction notice on May 18, 2026 to their previously announced tender offer for Ryomo Systems Inc. (code 9691), filed on May 14, 2026. The correction modifies two key financial disclosures regarding Ryomo Systems' dividend policy. First, the per-share dividend for fiscal year ending March 2026 has been adjusted upward from 22 yen to 44 yen. Second, the no-dividend (zero dividend) policy periods have been expanded: in addition to the previously stated no-dividend decision for the second quarter ending September 30, 2026, the company has also decided not to pay a dividend for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2027. These adjustments represent material corrections to investor decision-making information related to the ongoing tender offer.
